title: Kuroobi Blocks the Rescue
description: On pages 10–13, kuroobi blocks the rescue focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Kuroobi, Nojiko as luffy becomes trapped in the sea, forcing Sanji and the others to split their attention between saving him and winning the fight.
scene: On pages 10–13, kuroobi blocks the rescue focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Kuroobi, Nojiko as luffy becomes trapped in the sea, forcing Sanji and the others to split their attention between saving him and winning the fight.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Hmph, how weak. Compared to your kicks on land, your power has been reduced by half.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: However, the same doesn't apply for fishman karate...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: In fact, depending on the technique, its power is doubled!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Guh! It hurts too much! I need air! air!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Where do you think you're going...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Damn it! Just let me get by! I need to breathe...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: to think you could survive my attacks... it's hard to believe you're merely human.

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
